stemHtml: A pilot reports to ATC “Disconnected from LOVV. Logging in to LOVL”. What does the pilot want to inform ATC?

options.a: The pilot is requesting a CPDLC systems check.
options.b: The pilot is trying to contact LOVL as the aircraft has failed to connect to LOVV.
options.c: The pilot is requesting that ATC log on to LOVL.
options.d: The pilot has manually disconnected from LOVV and the aircraft is connecting to LOVL.
